title: CodeChicken Core
description: Base common code for all chickenbones mods.
body:
Base common code for all chickenbones mods.

CodeChickenCore has been retired in Minecraft 1.11+ and merged with [CodeChickenLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/codechicken-lib).

We are partnered with [CreeperHost](https://www.creeperhost.net/partner/covers1624vpp)! Use promo code `covers1624vpp` at checkout for 15% off your first month
